name: Sea Pen
desc: Colonial marine cnidarians that look like antique quill pens.

name: Orange Sea Pen
desc: A large, bright orange sea pen that can retract into the sandy bottom.

name: Glass Sponge
desc: Deep-sea sponges with a skeleton made of silica glass fibers.

name: Sea Orange Sponge
desc: A firm, massive sponge often found in bright orange or yellow hues.

name: Encrusting Sponge
desc: Simple multicellular animals that filter water for food through tiny pores.

name: Soft Coral
desc: Corals with eight-fold symmetry, often forming flexible, swaying structures.

name: Cloud Sponge
desc: A large, complex glass sponge that forms delicate, cloud-like structures.

name: Lace Sponge
desc: A branching glass sponge that creates intricate, lace-like skeletal networks.

name: Sea Whip
desc: A tall, slender sea pen that resembles a long whip rising from the seabed.

name: Hexactinellid Sponge
desc: Unique sponges known for their rigid, glass-like skeletal structures.

name: Sea Fan
desc: A type of gorgonian coral that grows in a flat, fan-like pattern to catch currents.

name: Cockscomb Cup Coral
desc: A large, solitary stony coral with a distinctive cockscomb-like shape.

name: Breadcrumb Sponge
desc: A common sponge known for its crumbly texture and varied growth forms.

name: Bubblegum Coral
desc: A large, branching soft coral with bulbous tips that look like bubblegum.

name: Fan Coral
desc: A delicate, finely-branched coral that resembles a tiny, feathery fan.

name: Plate Sponge
desc: A large, flat sponge that grows in plate-like or saucer-like shapes.

name: Slender Sea Pen
desc: A thin, graceful sea pen that glows with bioluminescence when disturbed.

name: Red Sea Fan
desc: A vibrant red gorgonian coral that adds brilliant color to the deep reef.

name: Thorny Coral
desc: A branching coral covered in tiny, sharp-looking polyps.

name: Finger Sponge
desc: A glass sponge that grows in thick, finger-like projections.

name: Vase Glass Sponge
desc: A large, vase-shaped sponge with a complex, hairy-looking glass skeleton.

name: Feather Sea Pen
desc: A sea pen with a feathery appearance, anchored firmly in soft sediments.

name: Mushroom Soft Coral
desc: A colonial soft coral that resembles a cluster of small mushrooms.

name: Soccer Ball Sponge
desc: A round, compact sponge that looks like a small ball resting on the floor.

name: Golden Fan Coral
desc: A beautiful fan coral known for its bright yellow or golden coloration.

name: Fleshy Sea Pen
desc: A robust, fleshy sea pen with large, prominent polyps for filtering.

name: Deep-Sea Pen
desc: A long-stemmed sea pen found in the deeper reaches of the ocean floor.

name: Bird's Nest Sponge
desc: A sponge supported by a long stalk of glass fibers, resembling a nest.

name: Calcareous Sponge
desc: A small sponge with a skeleton made of calcium carbonate spikes.

name: Orange Ball Sponge
desc: A bright orange, spherical sponge with a rough, textured surface.
